narrative_beat: Os Nefilim retornam — não em carne, mas em algoritmo. O gigante translúcido sobre a cidade moderna é a sombra da antiga usurpação do DNA humano

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: extreme low-angle, street level looking up
shot.depth_of_field: full scene in focus from street to giant's head

subject.primary: colossal ancient Nephilim giant figure, muscular and imposing, rendered in warm gold and ochre tones but partially translucent like a ghost or projection, towering over the city skyline
subject.focal_point: the giant's face and the hand reaching downward toward street level
subject.secondary: city buildings dwarfed below, the giant's feet at rooftop level or above
props: massive hand reaching down toward camera
arrogant expression on face looking down at tiny humans
floating orange embers trailing from giant's form as it moves

environment.location: modern metropolitan city, aerial urban view
environment.atmosphere: ancient terror returned, the Nephilim bloodline reasserting dominion

composition.rule: monumental vertical scale — giant fills right two-thirds of frame vertically, city below in lower third, Ken Burns slow tilt from city base upward to giant face
composition.foreground: street level with tiny human figures barely visible, giant's feet and ankles looming
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white modern city aerial view — skyscrapers, highways, urban grid, dark churning sky

lighting.key_light: amber supernatural glow emanating from within the giant's translucent form
lighting.fill_light: cold desaturated city lights from below barely illuminating the lower body
lighting.rim_light: crimson atmospheric light from sky backlighting the giant's silhouette
lighting.mood: ancient dominion reestablished, the return of what was expelled

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: primal ancient terror, humanity's smallness before the returned giants

symbolism.primary: the Nephilim giant represents the ancient genetic manipulation now being replicated through AI and transhumanism
symbolism.secondary: the translucency shows the Nephilim as both past event and present spiritual reality simultaneously

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
